---
title: "Global Development Finance"
page-layout: article
---

# Global Development Finance

**Provider:** World Bank

## Description

World Bank dataset on financial flows, external debt, and financial indicators for developing countries. Supports research on development finance and international economic conditions.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](http://data.worldbank.org/data-catalog/global-financial-development)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
